name: prism
description: PRISM intelligence for Claude Code — prompt review, cost tracking, and real-time optimization

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Optra API key (starts with gck_)

enableGateway.title: Enable Gateway
enableGateway.description: Route Claude Code API calls through Optra gateway for intelligence (default: true). Use /prism:status to toggle.

prismThreshold.title: PRISM Threshold
prismThreshold.description: Minimum prompt efficiency score 0-10 (prompts below this are blocked)

showStatusLine.title: Show Status Line
showStatusLine.description: Show the [Prism] status line after every turn (default: true). Use /prism:status to toggle.
